name: Fresh Fruit Platter
recipeInstructions:
1. For dressing, combine yogurt, syrup (Aunt Jemima or Lite), 2 tablespoons lemon juice, and cinnamon.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator until ready to use.
4. Dip banana slices in remaining lemon juice.
5. Arrange the remaining fruit on a platter.
6. Garnish with mint leaves if desired.
7. Serve with the dressing drizzled over the top.
